description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical body, slightly bulging at the center and narrowing towards the top and bottom. The barrel is constructed from vertical wooden staves, held tightly together by several evenly spaced metal hoops or bands. The wood has a warm, reddish-brown hue with visible grain and subtle weathering, suggesting age and use. The top surface is flat and features printed text, while one side of the barrel displays the marking 'CICERO & CO.' in bold, dark letters. The metal bands are slightly tarnished, adding to the rustic, utilitarian appearance. This type of barrel is commonly used for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods in urban, industrial, or warehouse settings.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with metal hoops, printed text on the top, and a bold 'CICERO & CO.' marking on the side. The wood is reddish-brown and the barrel has a classic, slightly bulging shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full round face of the barrel with visible wood grain and metal hoops, but no side markings.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing part of the top text and a faint marking on the right side, with the metal bands clearly visible.
description_view_2: Side view prominently displaying the 'CICERO & CO.' marking across the barrel's midsection.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view with no major markings visible, showing the curvature and banding of the barrel.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: CICERO & CO., printed text on top
